title: Supplementary Software 1: MFP-Score and OPR Reproducibility Workflow for Monolithic MOF Formation
description: Release-ready supplementary software package accompanying the manuscript 'A Reproducible Software-Resource Workflow for AI-Guided Prediction of Monolithic Metal-Organic Framework Formation'. The package regenerates demonstration-level MFP-Score rankings, OPR suggestions, feature diagnostics, uncertainty reports, ablation/sensitivity summaries, output manifests, checksums, and validation reports.

creators.name: Wei, Jinnan
creators.affiliation: Department of Chemistry, University of Cambridge

notes: MIT-licensed supplementary software release v1.0.1. Software license is MIT. Outputs are demonstration-level and hypothesis-generating, not experimentally validated predictions.
